scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n ncm,server,web -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:ncm" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @musicgpt/server && npm run build -w @musicgpt/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @musicgpt/shared && npm run test -w @musicgpt/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @musicgpt/shared && npm run typecheck -w @musicgpt/server && npm run typecheck -w @musicgpt/web
